theme_and_archetype.vibe: Authority, clarity, function-first, and technical precision. Inspired by Godly dark-mode apps like Linear and GitHub.

colors.description: High contrast, sharp neutrals. Not pure black, but deep tinted grays (#0A0A0A) combined with saturated accents for statuses.

typography.rules: The Anti-Default Rule applies. Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato, or Syne for Headings. BANNED: Space Grotesk.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gap strategy (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. No text collision.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: F-Pattern layout for dashboard. Left sidebar for navigation, top-left for primary North Star Metric.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Subtle roundness, max 8px border-radius (rounded-md or rounded-lg). No pill-shaped buttons unless explicitly required for small tags.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.
surface_strategies.auth_page: Crystal Glassmorphism over the 3D abstract background. bg-black/60 (Dark Mode) or bg-white/70 (Light Mode) with backdrop-blur-xl and backdrop-saturate-150. Mandatory 1px inner stroke (border-white/10).
surface_strategies.header: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (border-b border-border) to define space clearly.

components_instructions.navigation: Responsive sidebar navigation (collapsible). F-Pattern layout. Must be visible on desktop.
components_instructions.kanban_board: Framer-motion or robust drag-and-drop library. Dense cards but visually clean. Columns: Todo, In Progress, Review, Done. Overdue tasks must use red indicator.
components_instructions.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog. Heavy customize with the 'Control Room' dense aesthetic.
components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts (integrated via Shadcn). Colors must match the high-contrast archetype palette. Transparent tooltips with 1px borders.
components_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboards and developer tools.

animations_and_motion.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. E.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white. Hover state color must be a lighter hue of ACTIVE state color.
animations_and_motion.transitions: Use specific properties, NOT transition-all. e.g., transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out.

auth_background.description: High-end 3D abstract geometric shapes, dark moody environment. Use as full-screen cover on the login/signup page with a glassmorphism card on top.

avatars.description: Male avatar 1 - Use for team members / assignee UI.
Male avatar 2 - Use for team members / assignee UI.
Female avatar 1 - Use for team members / assignee UI.
Male avatar 3 - Use for team members / assignee UI.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button').
